headline: A Look At Mondelez International (MDLZ) Valuation As Shares Show Renewed Momentum
summary: Why Mondelez International (MDLZ) is on investors’ radar today Mondelez International (MDLZ) has drawn fresh attention after recent trading, with the stock last closing at $61.76. Investors are weighing that price against its recent returns and the company’s current earnings profile. See our latest analysis for Mondelez International. Recent trading has been supported by a 7.2% 1 month share price return and a 15.1% year to date share price return, although the 1 year total shareholder return...
